positive: A symmetrical, central crest design featuring stylized constellations and abstract geometric celestial bodies. The composition must have strong, clean, black linework against a solid, cream-colored background. Incorporate detailed representations of crescent moons, planetary orbits, and stylized mythic creatures like griffins and celestial dolphins, rendered in a vintage engraved etching style. Use limited, highly contrasting colors (deep indigo, gold leaf texture simulation, and matte black) to achieve a luxurious, graphic appeal. The overall design should read as a cohesive, sophisticated emblem suitable for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing high contrast and clear silhouettes.
negative: blur, noise, grain, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, illegible, low detail, graffiti, photorealism, gradient wash, cartoon, distressed, busy
